title: Questions from Quarantine: New Mask Guidelines, Reinfection Potential, and Quarantine Tips
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and don't forget to Tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine for a chance to have your question featured in next week's episode!
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and don't forget to Tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine for a chance to have your question featured in next week's episode! result.main_content_en: This article announces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' hosted by Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. The series aims to address public inquiries related to the COVID-19 pandemic, offering guidance on topics such as new mask guidelines, the potential for reinfection, and general quarantine tips. It encourages audience participation by inviting questions via social media with a specific hashtag for a chance to be featured in future episodes. The content is presented as an informational resource from a think-tank's global health project, focusing on providing expert advice during a public health crisis.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列旨在解答公众关于COVID-19大流行的疑问，提供关于新口罩指南、再感染可能性以及一般隔离建议的指导。文章鼓励观众通过社交媒体使用特定标签提问，有机会在未来的节目中被选中。该内容作为一个智库全球健康项目的信息资源，侧重于在公共卫生危机期间提供专家建议。
